title: lolium × elongatum
intro: Lolium × elongatum, also known as Ryegrass, is a hybrid of the Lolium multiflorum and Lolium perenne species, a type of cool-season grass that is commonly used as a pasture grass or hay crop. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to treat conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ryegrass include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Ryegrass is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions or as a preventative measure to maintain overall health and well-being.
